# CWE-1392 safe: admin password from secret env var
lang: go
file: CWE-1392-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1392 mitigated: initial admin password loaded from environment, not a default literal.

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type AdminUser struct {
	ID       uint
	Username string
	Password string
}

func BootstrapAdminSafe(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		secret := os.Getenv("BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_PASSWORD")
		if secret == "" {
			c.JSON(http.StatusServiceUnavailable, gin.H{"error": "bootstrap password not configured"})
			return
		}
		hash, err := bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(secret), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		rec := AdminUser{Username: "admin", Password: string(hash)}
		if err := db.FirstOrCreate(&rec, AdminUser{Username: "admin"}).Error; err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"admin_ready": true})
	}
}
